title: Medieval  Project
description: The #1 medieval modpack of low to mid end pc's
body:
![A decorated house from the inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62739c92771f6fad114c3123266c3bcc8a8fa833.png)
# The Medieval Project
Thank you for choosing this modpack.
This modpack is going to give you that medieval experience.
I got most medieval mods and a lot of fps mods so you don't lag out.
It was a lot of things to do while having great fps.
Also use a resource pack to make the game look way better.
Or use "**stay true**" To make the game look good.

## What this Modpack offers
This modpack is for you and your friends to explore and have wars.
If you make a sever using this modpack just give me credit.

### Credit 
Thank you for the poeple that made the mods.
